zone_placement_rules.notes: Elara's house frames the starting read, per MV-HOM-ASH-001 ST-ASH-FIRST-ARRIVAL.

variants.notes: Baseline weighted label; recorded in GenerationManifest/MapPlan provenance and in the layout_variant seed stream. This archetype does not yet hook variant_id into zone selection (unlike ARCH-INTERIOR-SHOP's browse_loop special case), so the two variants are a provenance/extensibility axis here, not the compositional-difference mechanism for this fixture.

Same note as organic_core. This fixture's actual meaningfully-different composition comes from required_beats (cultivation_edge/forest_edge optional zone + module inclusion), the established mechanism ARCH-INTERIOR-SHOP already uses for its own optional service_point -- see generate_wo0071_fixtures.py and test_map_vision_integration.py.

provenance.notes: WO-0071 disposable fixture layout family, not a production-corroborated pattern.
